text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I've looked at the pages in question, and can't see where the problem 
is.  The section that talks about getting CVSup says that CVSup can be 
downloaded from the main FTP site, or from the mirrors, and links to 
the Handbook section that talks about all the mirrors. 

So no problem, right?
